body.p: 10th International Conference on Education (EDU 2025) will provide an excellent international forum for sharing knowledge and results in theory, methodology and applications impacts and challenges of education. The conference documents practical and theoretical results which make a fundamental contribution for the development of Educational research. The goal of this conference is to bring together researchers and practitioners from academia and industry to focus on Educational advancements and establishing new collaborations in these areas. Original research papers, state-of-the-art reviews are invited for publication in all areas of Education.
